transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a man and a woman.

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Are you still joining the language exchange meeting tonight?

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Yes. It's a great chance to practice speaking with native speakers.

transcript.question_intro: Why is the woman attending the meeting?

questions.prompt: Why is the woman attending the meeting?

choices.text: To practice speaking with native speakers.

questions.explanation: She says it is a great chance to practice speaking with native speakers.
questions.evidence: It's a great chance to practice speaking with native speakers.
